title: Aghanashini–Vedavathi River-Linking Project
description: Source: NIE Subject: Mapping Context: UNESCO has advised the Government of India to strictly adhere to World Heritage Conservation norms regarding the proposed Aghanashini–Vedavathi river-linking project. About Aghanashini–Vedavathi River-Linking Project: About Aghanashini River: What it is? The Aghanashini is one of the most pristine, free-flowing rivers in India.
